title: User Management
subtitle: Manage roles, country access, and account approvals

accessDenied.title: Access Denied
accessDenied.message: This page is restricted to Admin users only. Contact your administrator to request access.

rlsBlocked.title: Admin Policy Missing
rlsBlocked.descSuffix: RLS policy has not been applied yet. Admin profile edits will silently fail until this migration is run in the Supabase SQL Editor.
rlsBlocked.footerNote: After running the SQL, refresh this page. The user list and edit functionality will restore automatically.

filters.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, username or employee ID

states.rlsUnavailable: User list unavailable. See warning above.
states.noUsersMatch: No users match the current filters.

org.assignTooltip: Assign this user to an organisation

errors.rpcMissing: Permission denied. Ensure the admin_update_profile RPC function is deployed in Supabase.

activity.title: Recent Activity
activity.subtitle: Last 100 audit log entries
activity.noDataHint: The audit_log table may not have data yet. Run MIGRATIONS_V6_AUDIT.sql to create it.

editModal.title: Edit User
editModal.ownProfileBanner: You are editing your own profile.
editModal.lockedBanner: This account is currently locked and cannot log in.
editModal.cannotChangeOwnRole: You cannot change your own role.
editModal.noRestriction: No restriction - user can see all countries.
editModal.lockedHint: Locked accounts are blocked from login.
